text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, why aren't you picking up?! Here I<n>am taking
the time to call you back!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Guess I'll just have to get my<n>revenge with
a voicemail.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Blue flowers, forget-me-nots. ☆ Shoo,<n>Papa, I'll
forget-you-lots! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Aaand done. Oh, I can't even imagine<n>the face
Papa will make when he hears<n>this! Teehee. ♪
